semantic.role: Demonstration script for the ArchSpine CLI, showcasing a basic build-and-run workflow.
responsibilities: Present a terminal recording of building the ArchSpine project from source.
Demonstrate the `sync --fast`, `info`, and `scan --dry-run` CLI commands in sequence.
Illustrate the typical first steps a user would take after cloning the repository.
outOfScope: Detailed explanation of any ArchSpine internal architecture or configuration.
Comprehensive CLI reference or command documentation.

English.purpose: This document is a terminal recording script (VHS tape) that visually demonstrates the core setup and diagnostic workflow of the ArchSpine project. It is meant to quickly show new users or evaluators what running ArchSpine looks like in practice.
English.context_and_audience: The primary audience is developers or technical evaluators who want to see a live terminal walkthrough of ArchSpine before diving into written documentation. The script assumes familiarity with Node.js build processes and CLI tools.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine can be built from source using `npm run build`.
The CLI provides commands for syncing (`sync --fast`), inspecting project state (`info`), and dry-run scanning (`scan --dry-run`).
The demo is self-contained and does not require external services or data.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该文档是一个终端录制脚本（VHS 磁带），用于直观展示 ArchSpine 项目的核心设置与诊断工作流。其目的是快速向新用户或评估者展示在实际操作中使用 ArchSpine 的体验。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 主要受众是开发者或技术评估者，他们希望在阅读书面文档之前通过实时终端演示了解 ArchSpine。脚本假定读者熟悉 Node.js 构建流程和 CLI 工具。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine 可通过 `npm run build` 从源代码构建。
CLI 提供了同步（`sync --fast`）、检查项目状态（`info`）和干运行扫描（`scan --dry-run`）等命令。
该演示完全独立，无需外部服务或数据。
